description: Estimate a nonlinear Engel curve (food_exp = alpha + beta * income^gamma) using the 'food.gdt' dataset. Initialize the parameters with alpha=50, beta=10, and gamma=0.5. Save the estimation script to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/nls_engel.inp and the resulting estimation output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/nls_engel_output.txt.
